name: RockBand Song List Generator
postCreateCommand: echo '✅ Dev container ready. Onyx: '$(onyx | head -1)' | Node: '$(node --version)' | Python: '$(python3 --version)' && (if [ -d /Volumes/incoming/temp/Rb4Dlc ]; then echo '✅ RB4 DLC share found at /Volumes/incoming/temp/Rb4Dlc'; elif [ -d /mnt/rb4dlc ]; then echo '✅ RB4 DLC share found at /mnt/rb4dlc'; else echo '⚠️ RB4 DLC share not mounted - run: mkdir -p /mnt/rb4dlc && mount_smb_share'; fi)
